description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a minimalist design. The exterior features a combination of white and gray walls, with a section of stone or brick cladding on the lower level. The house includes a driveway with a parked car, a small landscaped area with plants, and a tree on the lawn. The ground floor has a covered patio with outdoor seating, while the upper floor has a balcony with glass railings. The windows are generously sized, providing ample natural light to the interior spaces. The property is surrounded by a neatly maintained green lawn, giving it a clean and contemporary urban appearance.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a mix of white, gray, and stone exterior finishes, set on a green lawn with a driveway and patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered patio with seating, and large windows on both floors.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, glass balcony, and a tree on the lawn.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the driveway with a parked car, stone-clad wall section, and a landscaped area with plants.
description_view_3: Angled view of the driveway, garage entrance, and upper balcony with glass railing.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple door, no steps, covered patio, and minimal decorative elements
